gitCommit.subject: fix(gallery): add 3rd hero fallback — color-specific main when no generic exists
gitCommit.body:
fix(gallery): add 3rd hero fallback — color-specific main when no generic exists

Edge case found by exhaustive adversarial tests (INV4, trial=34):

  A product has main images with applies_to_color=True for color X,
  but none with is_primary=True and none with applies_to_color=False.
  When color X is selected, hero detection returned null because:
    1. no main+is_primary  → null
    2. no main+!atc        → null
    3. hero = null
  Result: product images for color X came first, with 'product' type
  at [0] — the main image was buried in the middle.

Fix: add a third hero lookup:
    ?? specific.find(i => i.image_type === 'main')
  This covers: product only has color-specific mains (all with atc=True).
  In this case, the main of the SELECTED color becomes the hero.

Note: "main for a different color" is correctly excluded — showing
  a BLUE main when RED is selected would be wrong UX. Only mains
  in the selected color's specific set are eligible for this fallback.

Test results: 35/35 PASS
  INV1: 3000 combos — 0 technical leaks
  INV2: 3000 combos — 0 duplicates
  INV3: 3000 combos (no color) — 0 failures: main always [0]
  INV4: 3000 combos (with color) — 0 failures: applicable main always [0]
  F12:  3000 products × 2 scenarios = 6000 — 0 leaks, 0 dups

specs.title: 93 · Login com credenciais inválidas permanece em /login
94 · RLS bloqueia leitura de tabelas sensíveis para o usuário comum
clique em 'Continuar com Google' dispara authorize com provider=google
/auth/callback com code válido troca por sessão e autentica usuário
/auth/callback com ?error= mostra hint detalhado e código do erro
mostra erro para link inválido (sem token)
renderiza formulário quando há token no hash
valida força da senha e critérios em tempo real
